spec.objective: Author internal/subagent/codex/pricing.go: the modelPrice struct, the priceTable keyed on OpenAI/Codex model IDs (initial set: codex-1; cacheRead at the OpenAI discounted cached-input rate; no cacheWrite field because OpenAI caching is automatic and marker-free), the conservativeTier fallback pointing at the most-expensive known tier, and the estimatedCostCents method on the Codex receiver — exact structural mirror of internal/subagent/anthropic/pricing.go. CacheCreationTokens is never included in the cost sum: the OpenAI caching model has no cache-creation billing concept. Uses pkg/dispatch.PriceOverride for the per-instance override merge following the same clone-then-merge pattern as the Anthropic implementation to avoid T-14-02 package-var mutation.
